raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against Citi Credit Card for failing to properly handle my dispute regarding duplicate charges on my account. 

XX/XX/XXXX I purchased airline tickets for my family, and while making the payment, the airlines app ( XXXX ) malfunctioned. Their IT support instructed me to reissue the transaction, which resulted in duplicate charges for each ticket. I disputed all four charges with my credit card company on XX/XX/XXXX. Two were approved, while the other two required additional information. Since the credit card statement itself clearly shows the duplicate charges, I submitted a letter highlighting them. 

Despite multiple calls over the past few months ( since XXXX ), where agents repeatedly assured me that the dispute would be reopened, I recently discovered that it was never actually processed. Again today XX/XX/XXXX, I was told it would be reopened, yet I have seen no action. Meanwhile, I am being charged interest on these duplicate charges due to their inaction. 

I request an investigation into this matter and assistance in holding Citi Credit Card Company accountable for failing to properly handle my dispute. Please let me know what steps I need to take to escalate this complaint. 
Best regards, XXXX XXXX.
